title: 阪神大賞典の後に・刺

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Narita Brian clutches victory at the Hanshin
Daishoten.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Fans are hoping she'll enter the spring Tenno Sho,
where she'd face off against Rice Shower, the
Sable Assassin...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Rice Shower is a formidable opponent, strong
enough to rival the likes of Mejiro McQueen and
Mihono Bourbon.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Narita Brian decides to enter the spring Tenno
Sho without hesitation.
